description: A previously out-of-stock item is now back in stock. The system needs to notify all customers who signed up for an alert.

nodes.task_description: Identify a product whose inventory has just been restocked.

expected_outcome.value: System detects a stock level change from 0 to a positive number.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the list of all customers who requested a back-in-stock notification for that product.

expected_outcome.value: System generates a list of email addresses.

nodes.task_description: Send an automated email to the notification list informing them the item is available again.

expected_outcome.value: System successfully sends all notification emails.
